Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
All parameters are within normal limits except for mildly elevated HbA1c (5.9%), indicating prediabetes, and a markedly increased platelet distribution width, which may suggest platelet size variability but should be interpreted with clinical context. Renal, electrolyte, and hematological parameters are otherwise unremarkable. Recommend monitoring glycemic status and correlating platelet findings with clinical picture.
